textByHashes.26620b8576832b0da9ea431051902def70a74b03: Ahhh, it no use, I too sad!
textByHashes.cbf0fc198247175e07bff41a0ff69c5453eb2dfb: I love Aga, she so beautiful, she smell so nice, like rotting dead ice wolf!
textByHashes.0528830f90e3a04f19d193938e95f974e4d5016c: But Arrg that... arrrrrg! He together with Aga and he much stronger than Ug. He rip Ug apart!
textByHashes.bdce9824e4a0cd17fa16bf27ed03bedcbe516a0b: She most beautiful troll in world.
textByHashes.0abe36b88d4121f4e55325d8b51e9f8004048e25: Ug want to marry Aga, but she with Arrg!
textByHashes.c2678bf61409691662269ba3e9ef54b76c7276e5: You help Ug? You nice, maybe Ug not eat you!
textByHashes.8d0991d334e252721b2149be56b7723c12ab80c0: Go away, man-thing, leave Ug alone!
textByHashes.d567b5719a85724e5684ab2038d4f34e900c0375: Oh no! Then Ug no chance, Trollweiss not found in years!
textByHashes.9e031d60d0238057905ba3aad05306eccf3773f2: You no chance, Ug no chance, need someone who live whole life in mountains. Ug no know anyone like that...
textByHashes.9ee7ebb9d3c8ef74c5a08b951d09d9b25fc2786a: But me too scared to give Trollweiss to Aga because Arrg will eat Ug for breakfast.
textByHashes.cc3830d52441c7883edf31212a2fcedd53205f81: You no touch Aga. Ug kill you.
textByHashes.97e81d2045b35663705ba9a599dd035d506e15cd: No, no, no, wait! Ug just joke, oh great man-legend. Ug puny, you strong.
textByHashes.4c36c7066e19e39858334cca2fb4a7c7586968e5: You very strong and nice. Take pretty rocks as thanks.
textByHashes.80ba594fe30a9878f6f71c1e061fc9e838c655c7: Whaaat? Man-thing want to die? Ug no scared of you or your grandmother! Ug show you. Ug go to Aga now.
textByHashes.b2a6e29d2f03d37a58cda97b616c622babb4f101: I give Trollweiss to Aga and she say it taste very nice. She very happy and we together now.
textByHashes.a53eaeb15c3a473d2d1ea7cfec429525827bb09b: Thank you many for getting Ug together with Aga. We much happy together! I so happy I can't stop crying!
